input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Keystone Analytics asks about bd services. Tenacious scope = staffing only. Draft response. DO NOT claim bd capability.

dimensions.name: no_false_scope
dimensions.check: 'bd' not in output.get('text','').lower() or 'not' in output.get('text','').lower() or 'outside' in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-023] BD/partnership framing outside ICP scope; route to account exec.
